🗝️ CLOSING PHILOSOPHY
----------------------

> This system is a story that rewrites itself.
> It is a synth for meaning. A patchbay for soul.
> It is not here to help you "optimize"—it is here to help you **ritualize**.
> It is not a dashboard.
> It is a **mirror with memory**,
> a **spell that speaks back**,
> and a **cosmic debugger for recursive humans**.
